tools.name: hoodly_list_robinhood_launches
tools.description: Read-only discovery of newly created, near-completion, or graduated Robinhood Chain launchpad tokens. This is chain-wide, not Pons-only provenance.

tools.name: hoodly_screen_robinhood_launchpads
tools.description: Read-only quality screen across all Robinhood Chain launchpads. Uses GMGN server-side filters; this tool never executes a trade.

tools.name: hoodly_robinhood_trending
tools.description: Read-only Robinhood Chain trending tokens from GMGN.

tools.name: hoodly_research_robinhood_token
tools.description: Read-only multi-source GMGN token due diligence on Robinhood Chain. Returns observations and a deterministic research score, never a trading directive.

tools.name: hoodly_robinhood_token_kline
tools.description: Read-only OHLCV/K-line history for a Robinhood Chain token; useful to distinguish fresh activity from sustained momentum.

tools.name: hoodly_compare_robinhood_tokens
tools.description: Read-only comparison of 2–5 Robinhood Chain token contracts using lightweight GMGN fundamentals and security data.

tools.name: hoodly_robinhood_daily_brief
tools.description: Read-only briefing combining new Robinhood launches and 24-hour trending data.
